name: 4pk Halloween Black/Purple Boo Tote Bag - Spritz™: Ghost Pattern, Multicolor Paper Gift Bags, 8.375" Height, 5.25" Width
description:
Delight your loved ones with gifts, snacks and offerings packed in the 4pk Halloween Black/Purple Boo Tote Bag from Spritz™. This set of 4 Halloween-themed gift bags comes in black and purple with fun, cute designs. Made from paper, each bag features festive Halloween quotes and prints, perfect for gifting or party favors. These bags are a great way to add a touch of holiday spirit to your celebrations and gifting, making your friends and family feel special.

Spritz™: Pops of joy that make the moment.
